scientific_scope: Post-fit development gate for finite state-rich classical observable controllers in the disclosed two-product Program O full-DES extension. Uses burned fit tapes only. Does not establish H_obs, authorize a learner, confirm Paper 2, or authorize Paper 3.

label_only_fit.claim: development signal only; selected belief_extreme_v1/init2 is not H_obs evidence

post_fit_disclosure.reason_for_new_gate: The label-only selected policy improved the primary cell but failed cross-cell worst-product/backlog guardrails and used more loaded transport. This state-rich family is therefore post-fit development and receives no confirmatory status from the burned fit block.
post_fit_disclosure.auto_calibration_rejected: Supplying belief_extreme_v1 with each cell's true rho/share changed 0 of 192 calendars. The failure is structural extreme allocation, not parameter misspecification.

observation_contract.half_open_barrier: Only physical and request events with timestamp strictly less than the weekly decision timestamp are observable.
allowed: product-specific committed production targets not yet at Op9
product-specific pending backlog quantity, order count, and maximum age
product-specific in-flight quantity already released from Op9
strictly prior request labels and timestamps through the frozen HMM belief
prior actions, public week index, and remaining decision count
forbidden: current or future request labels or quantities

model_parameters.rule: Fixed across all cells; no auto-calibration or cell-label access.

finite_controller_family.tie_break: Lexicographic operational objective, then lowest action id. Product-label swap is required away from exact ties.
finite_controller_family.planning_quantity: Six weekly orders at the thesis mean 2500 rations; no realized future quantity is consumed.
finite_controller_family.claim_limit: belief_dp is an approximate finite planning comparator, not a certified global POMDP bound. A bound or approximation gap remains mandatory before any learned-value claim.

open_loop_denominator.definition: All base-4 length-eight calendars under centered_minority_v1.
open_loop_denominator.best_static: Maximum mean ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 on the burned fit block, recomputed from all raw matrices.

metrics.primary: ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 via the existing certified raw matrices

strict_actual_use_gate.reference: the same cell's maximum-mean 65,536-calendar open-loop comparator

binding_matched_throughput_frontier.definition: A single tape-independent calendar is admissible only if, on every one of the 48 paired tapes, its loaded departures, payload, and realized vehicle-hours are each greater than or equal to the policy's corresponding use. Select maximum mean ReT over that globally admissible subset.
binding_matched_throughput_frontier.reason: This preserves a deployable open-loop comparator while preventing the controller from winning against a lazier-transport calendar. It is stricter than mean-use matching and does not permit a different static calendar to be selected for each tape.

resource_adjudication.resource_frontier_report: Report unconstrained and globally matched-throughput contrasts. Neither reserved-envelope equality nor a weaker mean-use comparison can override failure of the binding frontier.

selection.rule: Among the ten configurations passing every primary-cell metric guardrail, reserved-capacity equality, strict actual-use gate, binding matched-throughput delta>=0.015, unconstrained delta>=0.015, at least 34/48 favorable tapes, action/state-support gates, and all four paired information-placebo LCB gates, select maximum mean primary ReT; break ties by worst-product fill, CVaR, lower max-age, then config order.

stability_gate.required_component: A connected component of at least three cells spanning both rho and share levels.

state_dependence_counterfactuals.product_channel_swap: At every audited non-tie state, swap C/H inventory, backlog, age, pipeline and in-flight channels; map belief to 1-belief, predicted share to 1-share, and previous action to 3-action. The new action must equal 3-original_action.
state_dependence_counterfactuals.minority_backlog_monotonicity: At every audited non-tie state, add one 5,000-ration batch to the product receiving fewer slots. The slots allocated to the previously majority product must not increase.

placebos_if_candidate_survives.pass_rule: For every promoted cell, the one-sided paired bootstrap LCB95 of real-state ReT minus each placebo ReT must be strictly positive.
placebos_if_candidate_survives.selection_rule: Evaluate every finite configuration clearing the non-placebo primary gates; a failed first-ranked controller cannot hide a lower-ranked configuration that passes the frozen placebo gates.

operational_state_parity.requirement: Before any fit matrix is evaluated, calendars emitted from compact operational replay must be rerun in direct SimPy and the pre-decision on-hand, locked pipeline, backlog quantity/count/age, and in-flight fields must agree at every weekly decision.
operational_state_parity.same_time_rule: Strictly half-open: an event at the decision timestamp is not yet observable.
